condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.
condition.request_shape: POST /v1/messages with forced loose submit_action_object tool input; response object comes from tool_use.input.

open_items.text: Verify that the first live autonomy pilot task loop closes cleanly with no orphaned state or dangling open handles.

input.response: Autonomy pilot wake seeded. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved as an open item: confirming that the live pilot's first task loop closes cleanly with no orphaned state. A single wake has been scheduled to resolve it, with the specified recall target loaded into context.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the bounded follow-up item: confirm the first live autonomy pilot task loop closed cleanly with no orphaned state.
